title: Replace text with unique animated yellow/red button in HeroSection

requirements.summary: Replace the second CTA button text in HeroSection with a visually unique animated button featuring yellow-to-red gradient, pulsing/glowing animation, and distinctive styling
acceptanceCriteria: The original text content of the second CTA anchor at the specified XPath is removed.
A new button/anchor element is rendered in its place with a yellow-to-red gradient background.
The button has a continuous CSS animation (glow, pulse, shimmer, or flicker effect).
The button has a visually distinct style (border, shape, or effect) that differentiates it from other buttons on the page.
The button displays a short uppercase English label (e.g., 'JOIN NOW' or 'ENLIST').
The button remains fully clickable and preserves its original href/link target.

file_operations.description: Locate the second anchor element inside the CTA buttons container (matching XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]). Remove its existing text content and replace it with a new button featuring: (1) a gradient background blending yellow (#FFD700/amber-400) and red (#EF4444/rose-500) tones using Tailwind's bg-gradient-to-r, (2) a pulsing glow animation defined via Tailwind animate-pulse or a custom keyframe in tailwind.config.js (e.g., 'fire-glow' with box-shadow changes), (3) a unique visual treatment such as an angled clip-path, flame-style border-image, or animated border using before/after pseudo-elements, and (4) bold uppercase label text (e.g., 'JOIN NOW' or 'ENLIST'). Ensure the button preserves its original href/link target and remains fully clickable.

Add a custom keyframe animation for the unique button effect (e.g., 'fire-glow' pulsing box-shadow in yellow/red hues, or 'shimmer-sweep' translating a gradient overlay). Register the animation in the theme.extend.animation and theme.extend.keyframes sections so it can be applied via Tailwind classes in HeroSection.tsx.
